topics.title: Oprah's Legends Ball and Guest Interactions
topics.summary: The show features a critique of Oprah Winfrey's televised celebration of black women followed by an interaction with a caller regarding a woman taking his money.

topics.title: Oprah Winfrey Special and NFL Leadership
topics.summary: The studio discusses a recent Oprah Winfrey special honoring musical legends, the performance of Suzanne Muldowney in figure jogging, and potential successors for the NFL commissioner position.

topics.title: Siobhan and John's Encounter
topics.summary: The studio discusses a recent segment involving an individual named John who faced extreme conditions, including a cat-infested apartment and physical discomfort, while attempting to perform with Siobhan.

topics.title: Music and Idol Contest Strategy
topics.summary: The studio explores the production of acoustic music versions of popular hits and discusses a listener's strategy for contacting an American Idol contestant.

topics.title: Eric the Midget's American Idol Strategy
topics.summary: The studio discusses a plan for Eric to contact Catherine McPhee by claiming he controls a large network of votes from the midget community.

topics.title: X-Men Screening Conflict
topics.summary: The studio recounts a humorous dispute involving JD's complaints about Howard eating an apple during a private screening of X-Men 3.

topics.title: Guest Appearance and Career Aspirations
topics.summary: The studio hosts a guest who discusses her aspirations for a voiceover career in animation while the host questions her decision to avoid adult film work.

topics.title: Miss Howard Stern Interview
topics.summary: The show features a segment with Andrea, known as Miss Howard, who discusses her personal life, past relationships, and her role in the film Dorm of the Dead.

topics.title: Interview with Andrea Ownby
topics.summary: The studio hosts an interview with Andrea Ownby, who discusses her recent film, upcoming off-Broadway play, and details of a past sexual encounter.

topics.title: Fran Drescher Discusses Career and Personal Life
topics.summary: The studio features Fran Drescher discussing her current theater production, her transition from film to television, personal relationships, and her views on the death penalty.

topics.title: Celebrity Interactions and Media Commentary
topics.summary: The studio explores personal anecdotes involving Brooke Shields, discussions on adoption preferences, reflections on career transitions, and a critique of an Oprah Winfrey special.

topics.title: Celebrity Interviews and Show Updates
topics.summary: The studio features a series of segments including a discussion on Joe Pesci’s career, an interview with a retired actress regarding her views on Hollywood, and updates on the show's news team and upcoming weight loss challenges.

topics.title: Office Etiquette and Personal Correspondence
topics.summary: The show explores the concept of office etiquette while discussing a lengthy, multi-page love letter written to a former flame.

topics.title: Miss Howard Stern Segment
topics.summary: The studio features a heated and chaotic segment involving a guest, the discussion of her career longevity, and a series of repetitive phrases regarding her status as Miss Howard Stern.

topics.title: Repetitive Insulting Remarks
topics.summary: The show features a continuous loop of the same disparaging remark regarding a woman.

topics.title: Concerns Over Artie's Health and Celebrity News
topics.summary: The studio addresses a listener's concern regarding Artie's health and weight before transitioning to celebrity news, upcoming hurricane forecasts, and various entertainment segments.
